mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at FROM product_type_options WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, product_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at FROM product_type_options WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, product_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at FROM product_type_options ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE product_type_options SET product_name = #{productName}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
